book.spectrum.guidebook.block_variants.p: The brilliant white of Soapstone is perhaps one of the brightest natural colors I've come across – very clean looking and exuding dignity. It contrasts beautifully with the dark and noble tones of Greywacke.
book.spectrum.guidebook.fusion_shrine.pa:
Either [#](bb00bb)Soapstone[#]() or [#](bb00bb)Greywacke[#]() will do.\
Requires a focus structure and clear view of the sky.

- 1 Fusion Shrine
- 4 Polished Gemstone Blocks
- 4 Chiseled Polished Blocks
- 8 Polished Pillars
- 12 Polished Slabs
- 77 Polished Blocks

\
I'm able to switch [#](bb00bb)Greywacke[#]() with [#](bb00bb)Soapstone[#]() and choose the [Gemstone Blocks](entry://decoration/gemstone_deco) to my liking, as always.
I can build them out of every gemstone I found.\
Both [Chiseled Soapstone and Chiseled Greywacke](entry://decoration/block_variants@chiseled_and_notched) will do as a base.
book.spectrum.guidebook.gemstone_runes.p:
The [#](bb00bb)Soapstone[#]() and [#](bb00bb)Greywacke[#]() keep the gem's energies at bay as long as they completely enclose the geode, that much is certain. Sometimes, however, the energy that has built up over the centuries seems to be so strong that it literally tears a hole into the geode.\
\
I recreated the whole thing in miniature.
I can build them out of every gemstone I found. Both [Chiseled Soapstone and Chiseled Greywacke](entry://decoration/block_variants@chiseled_and_notched) will do for the frame.
book.spectrum.guidebook.gemstone_ores.ge: While the biggest gems are protected by layers of [](item://minecraft:calcite) and [](item://minecraft:smooth_basalt), some smaller deposits spread out further.
There's always something I forget when I leave my base... perhaps placing it in this decorative bowl will serve me as a good reminder?\
*Probably not.*\
\
I made both [#](bb00bb)Greywacke[#]() and [#](bb00bb)Soapstone[#]() variants.
book.spectrum.guidebook.item_roundel.pag: The greywacke and soapstone variants I cobbled together hold up to six stacks.
Hardened by heat and pressure, beautiful Alloy Forges can be made from soapstone and greywacke.\
\
Perhaps I will even find more minerals to use on my next adventure. Best to write them all down here.
Twice as fast as the Greywacke variant, but I have to refuel quite more often.

Getting lost deep down time and time again has made me carry a bit of [#](bb00bb)Chalk[#]() at all times, allowing me to mark the way back out. Unfortunately these little pieces of Soapstone never last long before they break.
book.spectrum.guidebook.pedestal_customi:
I can exchange the greywacke blocks with soapstone and choose the gemstone blocks to my liking.\
\
By mixing [#](bb00bb)Soapstone[#]() and [#](bb00bb)Greywacke[#]() I can give the structure my own personal touch.
book.spectrum.guidebook.preservation_tur:
High-tech machines, consisting of a reinforced shell of Greywacke and Soapstone, powered by an unknown source of energy that pulsates gently in the heart of these contraptions.\
\
Ready to poke holes in me as soon as I make my presence known.
book.spectrum.guidebook.block_variants.p:
The application of heat emphasizes their light and dark textures even more.\
When smelted, the Greywacke turns almost black. They can be crafted into a wide variety of decorative blocks using the [](item://minecraft:crafting_table) or [](item://minecraft:stonecutter).
